title: Timer Properties
description:
Timer Properties

Timer Properties and Events

The following list is a summary of the Timer control properties with brief descriptions.  Click on the property names for more details.

Property	Description

Enabled	Determines if the control is enabled or not.

Default: 1 - True

Interval	Sets the time between ticks.

Default: 0 - 100

Name	Used to assign a unique name to the Timer control.

Default: TimerXX

Event	Description

Tick	Occurs when a Timer control reaches its Interval value.
